conbody.p: Overview: The CMI and Capture Rate Summary dashboard provides insight into additional elements important to the management of the CDI program. The report includes month-to-month facility trends as well as comparisons to the hospital’s peer group. The data includes case mix index, secondary diagnosis capture, and medical/surgical proportions to assist the CDI manager and senior leadership in monitoring the health of their CDI program.
By default, the dashboard displays the data for reconciled inpatient encounters discharged in the last twelve calendar months.

Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One
Peer Group Comparison CMI and Capture Rate Summary .

The CMI and Capture Rate Summary dashboard displays the following charts:
Case Mix Index
MCC Pair Capture
MCC Triplet Capture
CC Triplet Capture
CMI and Capture Rate Summary
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the charts.
For filters on all pages, refer .

p.note: The images are for illustration purposes only.

p.b: CMI and Capture Rate Summary chart

fig.title: Sample Report
fig.note: The images are only for illustration purpose. Data in the reports will become available at a later time in documentation.

p.b: CMI and Capture Rate Summary - KPI Cards

entry.p: Peer Group associated with selected facility.

section.title: Case Mix Index
section.p: This chart displays the average complexity and resource use of patient cases, reflecting clinical and financial performance.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month based on discharge date selection. (Format: Oct, Nov)

Y-axis:
CMI After CDI - The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.
PG CMI - The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.

section.p: Info Icon (Text on hover): Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

section.title: MCC Pair Capture
section.p: This chart displays how often Major Complications or Comorbidities (MCC) are captured in pairs, compared with the peer group.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month based on discharge date selection. (Format: Oct, Nov).

Y-axis:
MCC Pair Capture Rate: Percent of reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair.
PG MCC Pair Capture Rate: Percent of Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair.

section.p: Info Icon (Text on hover): Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled

section.title: MCC Triplet Capture
section.p: This chart tracks the capture of MCC in triplets, helping measure coding accuracy and completeness against the peer group.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month based on discharge date selection. (Format: Oct, Nov)

Y-axis:
MCC Triplet Capture Rate: Percent of reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
PG MCC Triplet Capture Rate: Percent of Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.

section.p: Info Icon (Text on hover): Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled

section.title: CC Triplet Capture
section.p: This chart displays the rate at which Complications or Comorbidities (CC) are captured in triplets, compared to the peer group.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month based on discharge date selection. (Format: Oct, Nov)

Y-axis:
CC Triplet Capture Rate: Percent of reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
PG CC Triplet Capture Rate: Percent of Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.

section.p: Info Icon (Text on hover): Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

section.title: CMI and Capture Rate Summary
section.p: This chart displays your facility’s Case Mix Index (CMI) after CDI and the capture rates for MCC pairs, MCC triplets, and CC triplets. The dashboard also compares your metrics with peer group (PG) benchmarks across different months, ending with a total summary.

p.b: CMI and Capture Rate Summary Chart

title.b: CMI and Capture Rate Summary details

row.entry: The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.
Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair.
Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair.
Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet.
Percent of reconciled encounters and DRG Type is Medical.
Percent of reconciled encounters and DRG Type is Surgical.

ul.li: Displays the discharge date range. Data is grouped by month based on the selected Discharge Date.
With the Reset button, you can reset the discharge date range.
Tooltip: Use Cltr + click to "Reset" to clear the discharge date and select the required date.

entry.p: This filter lists the facilities (in alphabetical order) that you have access to. You can also search for a facility using the Search field. You must select a facility to generate the report.

row.entry:
Displays the list of payer categories.
Displays both active and inactive categories.
You can select multiple categories.
You can search the categories by entering the payer category Search field.
Default: ALL

entry.p: The type (Medical, Surgical) associated with the Final DRG Code.

ul.li: Displays the available DRG Specialties.
Example: Transplant, Surgery, Neurosurgery.
You can select multiple specialties.
You can search the DRG Specialty.
Default: ALL

entry.note: The values selected in the DRG Specialty filter remain visible when you navigate to other dashboards.

ul.li: Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient.
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types.Example: ED, IP, etc.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL

row.entry:
The Encounter Status assigned to the encounter.
Example: Reconciled Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

entry.p: Displays the discharge month as per the discharge date.

row.entry:
Displays the DRG grouper type.
Example: CMS.

Displays the peer groups.
Example: PG1, PG3.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all Peer Group reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.

Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair. MCC Pair Capture Rate = Reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair/ Reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG pair x 100.

Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair. MCC Pair Capture Rate = Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG pair/ Peer Group reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG pair x 100.

Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet. MCC Triplet Capture Rate = Reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet/ Reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG triplet x 100.

Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet. MCC Triplet Capture Rate = Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W MCC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet/ Peer Group reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG triplet x 100.

Percent of reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet. CC Triplet Capture Rate = Reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet/ Reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG triplet x 100.

Percent of Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet. CC Triplet Capture Rate = Peer Group reconciled encounters for Final DRG “W CC” and DRG is part of a DRG triplet/ Peer Group reconciled encounters and DRG is part of a DRG triplet x 100.
Percent of reconciled encounters with Final DRG Type of Medical. % Medical Cases = The count of reconciled encounters with Final DRG Type of Medical/The total count of reconciled encounters x 100.
Percent of reconciled encounters with Final DRG Type of Surgical. % Surgical Cases = The count of reconciled encounters with Final DRG Type of Surgical/The total count of reconciled encounters x 100.
